excerpt: In 2026, AI's disruptive impact led to a sell-off in software stocks, prompting sector rotation. Invesco's outlook highlights opportunities in private credit, equity, real assets, and hedge funds. Fidelity notes significant shifts in US equity and global markets.

content.introduction: In 2026, AI's disruptive impact led to a sell-off in software stocks, prompting sector rotation. Invesco's outlook highlights opportunities in private credit, equity, real assets, and hedge funds. Fidelity notes significant shifts in US equity and global markets.
body: ### Alternative opportunities: 2026 outlook for private credit and equity, real assets, and hedge funds. # Asset Allocation. Read actionable insights from our market strategy and global solutions teams. ### Asset allocation Capital market assumptions | Q1 2026. Invesco Solutions develops capital market assumptions (CMAs) that provide long-term estimates for the behaviour of major asset classes globally. ### Asset allocation Tactical asset allocation. Welcome to our Tactical Asset Allocation hub. Read our latest analysis that covers market strategy and opportunities across various asset classes. ### Asset allocation Quarterly Global Asset Allocation 2026 Outlook. Explore Paul Jackson’s Invesco Big Picture report, covering 2026 themes, markets and asset allocation. ### Alternatives Alternative opportunities: 2026 outlook for private credit and equity, real assets, and hedge funds. Welcome to Applied philosophy, our view on global equity market model sector allocation. Sign up to our newsletter to receive the latest investment insights, our upcoming events and webinars, and information about our products and capabilities.
Sector rotation: More disruptive deployment of AI has led to a sharp sell-off in software stocks and fuelled rotation within US equity and across regions.
Cross-asset analysis – expectations, risk premiums, return and risk, correlations and more · Implications for asset allocation and portfolio
